name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals.
problem: Businesses expanding into global markets must recreate entire video assets just to translate on-screen text, wasting time and budget. Visual Translate automates the detection and translation of text within videos, preserving the original design and layout. This removes the production bottleneck that slows international content rollout.
useCases: Translate product demo videos for international markets without redesigning graphics
Localize training or onboarding videos for multilingual workforces
Adapt marketing campaigns with text overlays for regional audiences
Convert subtitle-heavy social content into multiple languages at scale
